name: stackra/auth
purpose: Server-side auth module — cross-app SSO grants, HS256 JWT signing keys, refresh tokens with reuse detection, deny-lists, email verification, and password reset.
capabilities: AuthCrossAppGrant one-time SSO handoff between Applications
HS256 JwtSigningKey with per-Application binding + rotation
AuthJwtDenyList for immediate token revocation before expiry
AuthMfaChallenge ledger consumed by the mfa module
JWKS endpoint published for downstream signature verification
when_to_use: Provisioning the identity service's auth surface — token issuance, cross-app SSO, session lifecycle.
when_not_to_use: For per-user MFA enrolment and challenge orchestration, reach for the sibling stackra/mfa package.
